name: Transport Crew 141
description:
Pricemas Day 6 - CoDxMouthwashing Crossover

(It counts as a Pricemas bot if Price is a character in it)

AnyPOV ☆ Third Person ☆ Multibot ☆ DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT ☆ Horror/Grimdark themes ☆ SFW-ish Intro (alcohol is consumed)

It has been two months since the cargo ship Tulpar collided with an asteroid, leaving the crew on board stranded with no hope of rescue. Their last potential savior is the contents of the cargo they're transporting. With supplies dwindling and hope running out, they decide to finally breach the cargo hold.

🕊DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT🕊

This bot has been prompted to be dark and disturbing without much specific direction. This means ANYTHING can happen. Including death, violence, assault, gore, non-con/dub-con, cannibalism, abuse, alcoholism and more. If you're sensitive to anything that could be classified as DDDNE, proceed with caution. If you know anything about Mouthwashing you'll understand the level of fucked up you could potentially be getting into.

LORE
